summary: Iteration 25: Subscription System Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested subscription management: GET /api/subscription-plans/available, PUT /api/admin/plans/{id}, POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/assign-subscription, POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade. Also verified Guardian Portal Subscription tab, Admin Portal plan edit modal, and Admin Users assign subscription. Fixed missing SubscriptionFeatures import in server.py.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: SubscriptionFeatures was not imported from models in server.py - caused 500 error on assign subscription
All subscription API endpoints working correctly
Guardian Portal Subscription tab displays current plan, available plans, upgrade buttons, and coupon redemption
Admin Portal Plans tab shows edit button for each plan with full edit modal
Admin Portal Users tab shows 'PLAN' button next to each user for assigning subscriptions
Language dropdown text color is rgb(17,24,39) (dark gray) on white background - NOT invisible
Landing page prominently displays '20+ languages' badge in hero section and stats bar
seed_data_creation: None required - existing plans used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription system fully functional. Admin can edit plans (name, price, seats, is_active), assign subscriptions to users. Parents can view subscription tab with current plan and available plans. Language dropdown has visible dark text. Landing page shows 20+ languages badge prominently.

bug_fix_applied.fix: Added SubscriptionFeatures to the import statement in server.py line 16-30
bug_fix_applied.verification: Backend test now passes - admin can assign subscriptions to users
